title: MADRAS SHELTER DAYTIME SERVICES - 211info
text: MADRAS SHELTER SERVICE CENTER MADRAS SHELTER DAYTIME SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop in center, meals, case management, showers, and laundry services. Volunteer opportunities available. 61 NW Oak Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted with a focus on individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Drop in center: 7 days per week 7am-1pm and 6pm-10pm Lunch: 7 days per week 11am-12:30pm Dinner: 7 days per week 6pm-8pm Showers: Monday/Friday 7:30am-12:30pm Laundry: Thursdays 7am-1pm drop off, Friday pick up times vary Email (458) 800-4208 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 800-4208 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jefferson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located behind Sonic Drive-In at 4th and Oak Streets. The Cascade East Transit bus 20 stops at the 4th Street Shelter Center 1 block from the location. Services: Case/Care Management * Homelessness Issues Community Meals Homeless Drop In Centers Laundry Facilities Public Showers/Baths Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - MADRAS SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MADRAS SHELTER SERVICE CENTER
